title: course.yml
description: Descriptor at the root of a resources/<institution-slug>/<course-slug>/ directory.

language.description: ISO 639-1 codes present in this course.

topics.description: Informational summary of topics covered, shown in the generated index. Does not have to be exhaustive; the authoritative per-asset topic comes from assets/<topic>/ or a sidecar file.

license.description: Falls back to the resource default_license, then the repository-wide default (CC-BY-SA-4.0), if omitted.

external_assets.description: Large binaries (recordings, oversized decks, datasets) referenced by link instead of committed. See PLAN.md section 5.2.
